subject: Transfer Step 2 (build calendar) into combined notebook
description: Add a new markdown section '## Step 2: Build Calendar' after the (now in-memory) Step 1 output, transferring build_calendar_index() from pre_csd_2_build_calendar.py (02_thesis_data/_02_preprocessing/nielsen/CSD/pipeline_step_scripts/pre_csd_2_build_calendar.py, lines 100-159) -- this reindexes each series (per GRAIN_CONFIG's group_keys) onto a complete monthly calendar between start_date/end_date, filling gaps. Strip input_parquet_for_grain()/output_parquet_for_grain() path helpers (lines 89-98, no longer needed for in-notebook flow), run_step()'s file I/O wrapper (lines 160-230), and main()/argparse (lines 231+). Pass the in-memory `df` from Task 2 directly into build_calendar_index() instead of reading step_1_aggregate_{grain}.parquet from disk. Store the result as a new variable (e.g. `df_calendar`) and print/display before/after row counts (raw rows vs. reindexed rows) so Brian can see how many calendar gaps were filled -- this is exactly the kind of 'missing periods vs missing values' audit flagged as a gap in the P0029 ChatGPT analysis reconciliation, so make sure the gap count is visibly printed, not just computed silently. Verify by comparing df_calendar's shape and gap-fill count against a fresh `python pre_csd_2_build_calendar.py --grain bymonth` run's step_2 output parquet.
activeForm: Transferring Step 2 (build calendar) into combined notebook
